section.div: lavalink music bot base in lavalink-client and discord.js v14
OpenAssistant is a chat-based assistant that understands tasks, can interact with third-party systems, and retrieve information dynamically to do so.
A fun 𝗱𝗶𝘀𝗰𝗼𝗿𝗱 𝗯𝗼𝘁 🤖 that displays a 𝒓𝒂𝒏𝒅𝒐𝒎 𝒊𝒎𝒂𝒈𝒆 from your Google Photos album every 12 𝒉𝒐𝒖𝒓𝒔 🖼️ 📸 Surprise your server with a random image twice a day 🤗
OpenAssistant is a chat-based assistant that understands tasks, can interact with third-party systems, and retrieve information dynamically to do so.
